main.name: Ashling, the Limitless
main.oracle_text:
Elemental permanent spells you cast from your hand gain evoke {4} as you cast them. (If you cast a spell for its evoke cost, it's sacrificed when it enters.)
Whenever you sacrifice a nontoken Elemental, create a token that's a copy of it. The token gains haste until end of turn. At the beginning of your next end step, sacrifice it unless you pay {W}{U}{B}{R}{G}.

card.name: Cavalier of Night
card.oracle_text:
Lifelink
When this creature enters, you may sacrifice another creature. When you do, destroy target creature an opponent controls.
When this creature dies, return target creature card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Risen Reef
card.oracle_text: Whenever this creature or another Elemental you control enters, look at the top card of your library. If it's a land card, you may put it onto the battlefield tapped. If you don't put the card onto the battlefield, put it into your hand.
card.flavor_text:
"No, not 'washed' ashore. It *walked* ashore."
—Shafring Hulm, beachcomber

card.name: Ashnod's Altar
card.oracle_text: Sacrifice a creature: Add {C}{C}.
card.flavor_text: The Brothers' War scarred the land, but Ashnod left her mark in the bloodlines of those she tortured.

card.name: Metamorphosis
card.oracle_text:
As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature.
Add X mana of any one color, where X is 1 plus the sacrificed creature's mana value. Spend this mana only to cast creature spells.

card.name: Regal Force
card.oracle_text: When this creature enters, draw a card for each green creature you control.
card.flavor_text: It rarely moves, standing stock still in its clearing. When it does stir, ravens stop their cawing and crickets their chirping. All of nature watches in awed silence.

card.name: Grave Sifter
card.oracle_text: When this creature enters, each player chooses a creature type and returns any number of cards of that type from their graveyard to their hand.
card.flavor_text: It claws at the earth in a vain attempt to reclaim what it once was.

card.name: Breeding Pool
card.oracle_text:
({T}: Add {G} or {U}.)
As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.
card.flavor_text:
"One beginning, many paths."
—Vannifar

tokens.oracle_text:
Deathtouch
{T}: Conjure a card named Forest onto the battlefield. Activate only if two or more Elf cards are in your graveyard.

tokens.name: Lamentation
tokens.oracle_text:
When this creature enters, destroy target creature an opponent controls. You gain 3 life.
Encore {6}{B}{B} ({6}{B}{B}, Exile this card from your graveyard: For each opponent, create a token copy that attacks that opponent this turn if able. They gain haste. Sacrifice them at the beginning of the next end step. Activate only as a sorcery.)

tokens.name: Outcaster Trailblazer
tokens.oracle_text:
When this creature enters, add one mana of any color.
Whenever another creature you control with power 4 or greater enters, draw a card.
Plot {2}{G} (You may pay {2}{G} and exile this card from your hand. Cast it as a sorcery on a later turn without paying its mana cost. Plot only as a sorcery.)

tokens.name: Plot
tokens.oracle_text: After you plot a card, you may place the exiled card here. You may cast it as a sorcery on a later turn without paying its mana cost.

tokens.name: Preponderant Pearl
tokens.oracle_text:
When this artifact enters, conjure a card named Ponder into your hand.
Whenever one or more Merfolk you control deal combat damage to a player, sacrifice this artifact. If you do, conjure a card named Flooded Strand into your hand.

tokens.name: Subterfuge
tokens.oracle_text:
When this creature enters, target creature gains flying and "Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, draw that many cards" until end of turn.
Encore {7}{U}{U} ({7}{U}{U}, Exile this card from your graveyard: For each opponent, create a token copy that attacks that opponent this turn if able. They gain haste. Sacrifice them at the beginning of the next end step. Activate only as a sorcery.)

tokens.name: Tower Winder
tokens.oracle_text:
Reach, deathtouch
When this creature enters, search your library and/or graveyard for a card named Command Tower, reveal it, and put it into your hand. If you search your library this way, shuffle.
tokens.flavor_text: The tower guards eventually gave up, figuring it was better at the job anyway.

tokens.name: Treasure
tokens.oracle_text: {T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.
